description: A boutique lutherie studio specializing in handcrafted acoustic guitars. Each instrument is built to order using responsibly sourced tonewoods and traditional joinery techniques.

pages.name: Home
pages.description: Elegant landing page for a boutique guitar builder. Warm, crafted aesthetic. Lead with the instruments, not the builder.
sections: Hero: full-width with guitar photography placeholder, headline 'Instruments built to last a lifetime', CTA: View Current Builds
Intro: 2-3 sentence studio description, warm tone
Featured builds: 3 instrument cards with name, woods, and price

pages.name: Gallery
pages.description: Portfolio of completed instruments. Grid layout with lightbox on click.
sections: Filter buttons: All | Steel String | Classical | 12-String | Electric
Masonry or uniform grid of instrument cards: photo placeholder, model name, woods, year

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Commission inquiry form. Friendly, detailed. Sets expectations about lead time.
sections: Lead time notice: 'Current build queue: 14-18 months'
Commission form: Name, Email, Phone (optional), Instrument Type, Top Wood preference, Back/Sides preference, Scale Length, Budget Range, Message
What happens next: 3-step process after form submit
